cards.name: King of Swords
cards.interpretation: reason, authority, discipline, integrity, morality, serious, high standards, strict

cards.name: Ⅵ The Lovers, reversed
cards.interpretation: disharmony, imbalance, conflict, detachment, bad choices, indecision

cards.name: King of Cups
cards.interpretation: wise, diplomatic, balance between head and heart, devoted, advisor, counsellor
